caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional black microphone in a room filled with memorabilia. He is positioned in front of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. To his right stands a white mannequin wearing a white garment. The background features clothing racks with various garments. Small logos, including one that says "REALLY" and "TOT," are visible in the lower corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his left hand, moving it from his chest toward his side. His facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to talk, while the background elements and equipment remain static.
